name: moonberry-glow
applies_to: separate Ability effect assets only — never Character body frames
method: hand-authored luminous ramp; two families (mint/cream for weapon arcs, violet/berry for spell blooms) sharing one cream core
note: Deliberately DISJOINT from moonberry-16 except where noted. That disjointness is load-bearing: the acquisition contract's embedded-effects validator rejects a Character frame containing any colour off moonberry-16, so effects drawn in this ramp are automatically caught if they are ever baked into Character pixels. Effect frames use binary alpha like Character frames; luminosity is carried by the ramp, not by translucency, so composition stays deterministic.
